error_signature: Connection lost: You have a connection issue or the server is down.
title: Connection lost error in n8n Docker setup
symptom: Users encounter a 'Connection lost' error when trying to import workflows in n8n. This prevents further actions from being taken within the application.
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The issue appears to be related to a bug introduced in n8n version 1.79.3, which affects the connection stability when running in a Docker environment. Downgrading to a previous version resolves the issue.
fix_steps: Verify that the connection issue is resolved
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.78.1 to resolve the connection lost error.
